title: Reclaiming Your Full Security Deposit: A Documented Move-Out Guide for Renters in Addis Ababa
excerpt: Reclaim full security deposit Addis Ababa: documented move-out guide renters, cleaning inspection photos, landlord handover tenant rights.
content:
Reclaiming your full security deposit: a documented move-out guide for renters in Addis Ababa

Full deposit return is documentation sport—renters who photograph move-in, clean professionally, and hand keys with signed form reclaim birr; renters who rush lose to vague "repairs." Documented move-out guide is evidence package landlord cannot inflate.

This guide helps Addis renters reclaim full security deposits at move-out.

Documentation timeline

  • Move-in: Photo every room timestamp store cloud.
  • Lease term: Report repairs written not verbal only.
  • T-30 move-out: Notice per lease.
  • T-14: Deep clean schedule professional receipt.
  • T-7: Request joint inspection landlord agent.
  • Move day: Meters photo; keys list signed.

Cleaning standard

Kitchen grease oven; bathroom scale; floors edges; windows tracks; balcony sweep; appliances functional bulbs working.

Damage disputes

Compare move-in photos; distinguish wear tear versus tenant damage; negotiate itemized not blanket; legal aid if bad faith withhold.

Active Movers coordination

Load before final clean if possible; or zone clean as rooms empty; avoid wall gouge dollies—runners request.

Deposit follow-up

Written demand timeline lease; polite escalation compound management mediator.

Conclusion

Full deposit reclaimed through move-in baseline, professional clean, joint inspection, signed handover—documented move-out beats hopeful WhatsApp argument every time.
author: Active Movers Team
